name: Banner ETHN_CODE → HESA ETHNIC
description: Banner US IPEDS ethnicity to HESA Coding Manual ETHNIC code. Approximation — UK ethnic categories have no exact US equivalent for many groups.

entries.notes: Black or African American → Black or Black British – Caribbean (approximation)
Asian → Asian or Asian British – Indian (approximation)
American Indian/Alaska Native → Other ethnic group
Two or more races → Mixed – White & Black Caribbean (approximation)
